meaning: n.菜肴的一种,浓汤v.(将菜,水果等)煮成浓汤,面包的一种
examples: Onions can be boiled and pulped to a puree.
I like to make puree, using only enough sugar to preserve the plums.
Transfer the broiled ingredients to a food processor and process into a coarse puree.
Ingredients include apple puree, filtered water, banana puree concentrate and three other kinds of fruit concentrate.
